scripts.compile: sass --load-path=node_modules --silence-deprecation=import --silence-deprecation=global-builtin --silence-deprecation=color-functions --silence-deprecation=mixed-decls --silence-deprecation=if-function --style compressed --source-map src/scss/design-system.scss:dist/css/design-system.min.css src/scss/saas.scss:dist/css/saas.min.css src/scss/legal-ops.scss:dist/css/legal-ops.min.css && node scripts/postcss-saas.js && vite build && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp src/fonts/* dist/fonts/
scripts.compile:dev: sass --load-path=node_modules --silence-deprecation=import --silence-deprecation=global-builtin --silence-deprecation=color-functions --silence-deprecation=mixed-decls --silence-deprecation=if-function src/scss/design-system.scss:dist/css/design-system.css src/scss/saas.scss:dist/css/saas.css src/scss/legal-ops.scss:dist/css/legal-ops.css && node scripts/postcss-saas.js && vite build && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp src/fonts/* dist/fonts/
